metadata.name: Arrange Shipping for a Customer Order

description: A logistics coordinator needs to arrange transportation for a completed customer order.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer order that is ready for shipment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the sales order and confirms its status is 'Ready to Ship'.

nodes.task_description: Get freight quotes from approved carriers based on the shipment's weight, dimensions, and destination.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives quotes from three different freight carriers.

nodes.task_description: Book the shipment with the most cost-effective carrier and generate the Bill of Lading (BOL).

expected_outcome.value: Agent books the shipment and prints the BOL for the driver.
